title: Service Level Agreement
description: Agreement defining expected service levels, measurement metrics, and remedies or penalties for unmet thresholds, applicable between companies or internal departments.

definitions.definition: Agreement defining expected service levels, measurement metrics, and remedies or penalties for unmet thresholds, applicable between companies or internal departments.
